positives: 5 fleet drivers (Kevin Anderson, Sean O'Brien, Katherine Taylor, Paul Nelson, Rebecca Kim) have a 'Clear' MVR status with 0 violations and 0 accidents.
A significant portion of the driver fleet has over 20 years of experience.
concerns: Scott Murphy and Jack Reed both have 'Major Violations' on their MVRs, each with 3 violations and 2 accidents.
The majority of the fleet drivers (33 out of 40) have at least one minor violation and one accident on record.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Motor Vehicle Reports indicate a high frequency of minor accidents across the fleet. 33 drivers have 1 accident, 5 drivers have 2 accidents, and only 6 drivers are accident-free.
